mother.title: Defeat the Mother of the Maze (Aquamirae — Deep Frozen Ocean, requires Drowned World scroll)

sea_heart.title: Collect rare Aquamirae loot from the Mother of the Maze

subtitle.text: The maze did not build itself. It grew.

description: The Mother of the Maze is the deeper Aquamirae encounter.
Where Cornelia hunted, the Mother built.
The underwater maze structure is her territory.
Rare loot from the Mother of the Maze completes
The Ocean Mages dissolved into the ocean they studied.
What Aquamirae adds is what remained after that dissolution.
Not ruins. Creatures. The civilization became the ecosystem.
→ Defeat the Mother of the Maze [check]
